nasb.text: The statutes and the ordinances and the law and the commandment which He wrote for you, you shall observe to do forever; and you shall not fear other gods.

esv.text: And the statutes and the rules and the law and the commandment that he wrote for you, you shall always be careful to do. You shall not fear other gods,

cnv.text: 他寫給你們的律例、典章、律法和誡命，你們要永遠謹守遵行，不要崇敬別的神。

ccb.text: 你们要永远谨遵祂所定的律例、典章、法度和诫命，不可祭拜其他神明。
